product_overview: An offline-first Arabic RTL web application for managing the full x-ray quality inspection workflow, from importing monthly population data to sampling, distribution, employee inspection, reporting, and archival restore. It runs as a single-page app in Chromium browsers with workspace data stored locally on disk.
core_goals: Import monthly x-ray population data from Excel files
Process and normalize population records for inspection workflows
Draw stratified samples for inspection assignment
Distribute sampled x-ray rows to employees and manage referrals and replacements
Let employees record inspection answers and review assigned work
Generate inspection and distribution reports for supervisors and managers
Manage users, permissions, and UI label customizations
Browse, archive, and restore workspace data snapshots

features.name: Workspace Folder Selection
features.description: The user selects a local workspace folder so the app can read and write all system and month data within that directory.
user_flows: Launch the app -> Choose a workspace folder -> Grant folder access -> See the app load with the selected workspace

features.name: Bootstrap Admin Login
features.description: The bootstrap admin can unlock the app using a hidden keyboard shortcut and passcode.
user_flows: Launch the app -> Use the hidden keyboard shortcut to open the admin login modal -> Enter the admin passcode -> Submit the passcode -> See the admin session start
Launch the app -> Use the hidden keyboard shortcut to open the admin login modal -> Enter an incorrect passcode -> Submit the passcode -> See an error message

features.name: Managed User Login
features.description: Managed users sign in with a username and password to access the app according to their role.
user_flows: Launch the app -> Select or enter a username -> Enter the password -> Submit the login form -> See the app open for the signed-in user
Launch the app -> Select or enter a username -> Enter an incorrect password -> Submit the login form -> See a login error message

features.name: Role Preview Switching
features.description: Admin users can preview the app as other roles without logging out, to inspect the tab and permission experience for each role.
user_flows: Sign in as admin -> Choose a different role preview from the admin toolbar -> See the app remount with that role's tabs and permissions -> Return to the admin role preview

features.name: Population Data Import
features.description: The user uploads monthly risk data and optional BI data from Excel files and reviews the parsed workbook summary before processing.
user_flows: Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة -> Open the processing flow -> Select the target month -> Upload the risk Excel file -> Optionally upload the BI Excel file -> Watch parsing progress -> Review the sheet summary and row counts

features.name: Population Processing & Save
features.description: After import, the user processes the population to deduplicate, normalize, enrich, and classify rows before saving the monthly output files.
user_flows: Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة -> Open the processing flow -> Review the imported workbook summary -> Paste or update the CertScan registry text -> Start population processing -> Review processing statistics -> Confirm saving the processed data to the workspace

features.name: Stratified Sample Drawing
features.description: The user draws a reproducible sample from the processed population using the configured stage and CertScan rules.
user_flows: Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة -> Open the sampling flow -> Review or adjust the sampling rules -> Enter a seed value or keep the generated one -> Draw the sample -> Review the stage and port breakdown -> Confirm saving the sample

features.name: Distribution / Assignment
features.description: The user assigns sampled x-ray rows to employees and saves the distribution event log and current snapshot.
user_flows: Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة -> Open the distribution flow -> Select employees and quotas -> Start assignment -> Review the assignment summary -> Confirm the distribution save

features.name: Employee Workspace - صور الأشعة المحالة
features.description: Employees and supervisors review assigned x-ray rows, search and sort records, inspect details inline, export visible rows, and submit answers or referral actions when permitted.
user_flows: Open مساحة العمل -> Open صور الأشعة المحالة -> Select the month -> Choose an inspection template -> Search the rows -> Sort or filter the table -> Expand a row to inspect details -> Fill in the inspection form -> Save a draft or submit the answer
Open مساحة العمل -> Open صور الأشعة المحالة -> Select the month -> Choose an inspection template -> Search the rows -> Expand assigned rows -> Request a referral for selected rows
Open مساحة العمل -> Open صور الأشعة المحالة -> Select the month -> Toggle between all rows and my assigned rows -> Export the visible rows to XLSX

features.name: Employee Workspace - Replacement Dialog
features.description: Admins can open a replacement workflow for a distribution entry, review replacement candidates, and confirm a reasoned swap.
user_flows: Open مساحة العمل -> Open صور الأشعة المحالة -> Select a row that supports replacement -> Open the replacement workflow -> Review recommended candidates or all candidates -> Select a replacement candidate -> Enter a reason -> Confirm the replacement

features.name: Employee Workspace - نتائج فحص الأشعة
features.description: Users can browse read-only inspection results for the selected month and export the table to XLSX.
user_flows: Open مساحة العمل -> Open نتائج فحص الأشعة -> Select the month -> Review the inspection results table -> Export the table to XLSX

features.name: Employee Workspace - اعتماد الطلبات
features.description: Supervisors and admins review pending referral and replacement requests and approve or reject them.
user_flows: Open مساحة العمل -> Open اعتماد الطلبات -> Review pending referral requests -> Approve or reject a request
Open مساحة العمل -> Open اعتماد الطلبات -> Review pending replacement requests -> Approve or reject a request

features.name: Template Builder
features.description: Managers and admins create and version inspection form templates by adding fields, configuring rules, and saving the template.
user_flows: Open نموذج الفحص -> Add a form field -> Set the field type and label -> Configure options or validation as needed -> Reorder or remove fields -> Save the template
Open نموذج الفحص -> Change field visibility rules -> Save the updated template version

features.name: Reports
features.description: Supervisors, managers, and admins generate Arabic HTML reports with summary tables and charts for a selected month.
user_flows: Open التقارير -> Select the month -> Generate the report -> Download the self-contained HTML report

features.name: Archive
features.description: Supervisors, managers, and admins browse backup snapshots and restore a selected workspace snapshot.
user_flows: Open الأرشيف -> Browse the backup list -> Open backup details -> Restore the selected snapshot -> Confirm the restore

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admins create and maintain managed users, set roles, activate or deactivate accounts, and adjust role and feature permissions.
user_flows: Open إدارة المستخدمين -> Add a user -> Enter username, display name, role, and password -> Save the new user
Open إدارة المستخدمين -> Select an existing user -> Update the user status or role -> Save the changes
Open إدارة المستخدمين -> Edit tab access or feature permissions for a role -> Save the permission changes

features.name: Settings (Label Overrides)
features.description: Admins customize UI label strings and immediately update the app text without code changes.
user_flows: Open الإعدادات -> Edit one or more label values -> Save the changes -> See the UI text update live
Open الإعدادات -> Reset a label to its default value -> Save the changes -> See the original label return

tech_stack.ui_library: Plain CSS co-located per component, RTL (dir=rtl), Arabic UI

tech_stack.other: xlsx (SheetJS CDN tarball), recharts, hash-wasm (Argon2id), File System Access API, Web Locks API, Web Worker (workbookWorker.ts)

routes.description: Single-page application — all navigation is tab-based (no URL routing). Login screen shown when unauthenticated. After login the app shell renders the Sidebar with tabs filtered by role + permission matrix.

features.name: Bootstrap Admin Login
features.description: Hidden keyboard shortcut (Alt+A then Alt+T, or Arabic equivalent) opens an admin passcode modal. Correct passcode logs in as the bootstrap "admin" user. Passcode is verified with Argon2id via hash-wasm.
user_interactions: Press Alt+A then Alt+T (or Alt+ش then Alt+ف) to open admin modal
Enter admin passcode in the password field
Press Enter or click دخول button
See error message on wrong passcode
Session persists in localStorage for 7 days

features.name: Managed User Login
features.description: When at least one managed user exists, a username + password form is shown. Passwords verified with Argon2id (or legacy PBKDF2 with transparent upgrade). Session stored in localStorage with 7-day TTL.
user_interactions: Select or type username in the username field
Session persists across tab restarts for 7 days

features.name: Role-Preview Switcher (Admin only)
features.description: Admin toolbar shows a segmented pill switch (الإدارة / المدير / المشرف / الموظف / ضيف). Clicking a segment previews the app as that role without logging out. Amber toolbar + (معاينة) flag when impersonating. Resets on logout.
user_interactions: Click a role segment in the admin toolbar to switch preview role
App remounts showing tabs/permissions for the chosen role
Click الإدارة segment to exit preview
Click تسجيل الخروج to logout (clears preview)

features.name: Population Data Import (Excel)
features.description: Phase 1 of the core workflow. Upload a risk Excel file (and optionally a BI Excel file). Files are parsed in a Web Worker (SheetJS). Results show row counts, unknown sheets, errors. BI sheet detection falls back to sheet name if no Arabic pattern matches.
user_interactions: Click to upload risk Excel file via file picker
Watch progress bar during Web Worker parsing
Review workbook report (sheet summaries, row counts, unknown sheets)

features.name: Population Processing & Save
features.description: Phase 2. After import, user processes the population: deduplication, field normalization, CertScan classification. Results saved to workspace folder as population.final.json and month.manifest.json inside a dated month folder.

features.name: Stratified Sample Drawing
features.description: Phase 3. Hamilton apportionment by port, CertScan/NonCertScan split, Fisher-Yates random draw, capacity-weighted spillover. Results saved as sample.master.json.
user_interactions: View sample size per port/tier breakdown

features.name: Distribution / Assignment
features.description: Phase 4. Assign sampled rows to employees. Append-only event log (distribution.log.json). Derived snapshot (distribution.current.json).
user_interactions: Select employees and quota per employee

features.name: Employee Workspace - صور الأشعة المحالة (Referrals Table)
features.description: Employees see their assigned X-ray samples. Supervisors/admins see all employees' rows and can toggle "الكل / مسنداتي فقط" between the search box and export button. Table supports column visibility, drag-reorder, date format toggles, XLSX export. Clicking a row expands an inline inspection form.
user_interactions: Select مساحة العمل → صور الأشعة المحالة from sidebar
Use الكل/مسنداتي فقط toggle (supervisors/admins only) between search and export
Search by typing in global search box
Click الأعمدة to open column picker
Click row to expand inline inspection form
Click حفظ مسودة or تقديم to save/submit answer
Click إحالة to request referral for selected rows (employees only)

features.name: Employee Workspace - Replacement Dialog
features.description: Admin can open a replacement dialog for a dead distribution entry. Candidates shown in two tabs (recommended / all), capped at 1000 random entries to prevent lag. Admin selects a replacement row and confirms.
user_interactions: Click استبدال on a row (admin only)
View recommended and all candidate tabs (max 1000 each)

features.name: Employee Workspace - نتائج فحص الأشعة (Inspection Results)
features.description: Read-only table showing inspection outcomes for the selected month. Includes تاريخ رصد الخبير (expert observation timestamp) column. No column picker — layout is fixed from the referrals preset.

features.name: Employee Workspace - اعتماد الطلبات (Referral Approval)
features.description: Supervisors/admins approve or reject pending referral and replacement requests.

features.name: Template Builder
features.description: Admin builds inspection form templates: add fields (text, select, date, etc.), configure field visibility rules, save versions. Templates stored in workspace.

features.name: Reports
features.description: Generate self-contained Arabic HTML reports for sample and distribution data. Reports include recharts visualizations.

features.name: Archive
features.description: Browse and restore backup snapshots stored in .system/backups/ inside the workspace.

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin creates, edits, activates/deactivates managed users. Assigns roles (employee/supervisor/manager). Sets per-role tab permission matrix. Changes broadcast via DOM events to all open components.
user_interactions: Edit permission matrix per role and tab

features.name: Settings (Label Overrides)
features.description: Admin overrides UI label strings stored in localStorage (xray-labels-v1). All components re-render via useLabels() subscription on change.
user_interactions: Edit label values in the form
Click save to persist to localStorage
See all UI strings update live

features.name: Workspace Folder Selection
features.description: On first launch (or if no handle stored in IndexedDB) the user selects a root workspace folder via the File System Access API (showDirectoryPicker). Only works in Chromium browsers (Chrome/Edge). The handle is persisted to IndexedDB.
user_interactions: User grants permission to a folder
App loads with the selected workspace

known_limitations.issue: File System Access API required — app only fully works in Chromium (Chrome/Edge); Firefox/Safari show unsupported_browser state
known_limitations.impact: No workspace data can be read/written in non-Chromium browsers

known_limitations.issue: No backend — all role/permission checks run in the browser; a user can edit localStorage to self-elevate
known_limitations.impact: Auth is a UX guard only, not a trust boundary

known_limitations.issue: Bootstrap admin passcode hash ships in the client bundle (authConfig.ts) — offline crackable
known_limitations.impact: Passcode must be strong; do not use a weak passcode

known_limitations.issue: showDirectoryPicker requires a user gesture — auto-restoring the workspace handle may prompt the user again after a browser restart
known_limitations.impact: Users may need to re-grant folder access after restarting the browser

known_limitations.issue: Excel parsing runs in a Web Worker; very large files (50k+ rows) may take 30–60 seconds
known_limitations.impact: UI shows progress bar but cannot be cancelled mid-parse
